channel.title: Artificial Intelligence on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Artificial Intelligence on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Claude Code Signals Shift to AI‑Model Management
item.description: Anthropic’s Claude Code marks a new era where AI‑assisted development tools focus on orchestrating models, reshaping software workflows and security.

item.title: Artificial State: AI, Democracy and Governance
item.description: Jill Lepore’s book examines how AI‑driven measurement reshapes politics—from Gallup polls to micro‑targeting—warning of an artificial state.

item.title: Infinity Raises $15M to Break Nvidia's AI Monopoly
item.description: Inference startup Infinity raises $15M to automate low_level code for AI chips, challenging Nvidia's CUDA dominance with its Ignition agent.

item.title: YouTube Fights AI Slop with New Monetization Rules
item.description: YouTube updates its policies to demonetize low_quality AI slop and distressing content to protect viewer experience and creator integrity.

item.title: Apple Tests AI‑Powered Live Notes at Genius Bar
item.description: Apple is testing an AI‑powered Live Notes feature in select stores, automatically transcribing repair sessions to iPads to save time and boost service.

item.title: China's AI Surge: How Moonshot and Alibaba Threaten US Tech Supremacy
item.description: Explore how China's Moonshot AI and Alibaba are disrupting the global AI landscape with Kimi K3, challenging OpenAI and Anthropic. Analyze technical, economic, and geopolitical implications.

item.title: Anthropic Gives Free Access
item.description: Anthropic gives teachers free access to premium Claude features for education purposes, details here

item.title: AI in Gov: DOGE Uses AI
item.description: US Gov uses AI for policy, denies info requests on AI tools

item.title: ELIZA Chatbot: AI Pioneer
item.description: Discover ELIZA, the pioneering chatbot that influenced AI development and human-computer interaction

item.title: Demis Hassabis Calls for AI Watchdog
item.description: Demis Hassabis suggests a global AI watchdog led by the US to regulate AI development

item.title: Apple Sues Open AI
item.description: Apple files lawsuit against Open AI for stealing trade secrets

item.title: PixVerse Raises $439M
item.description: PixVerse valuation soars past $2B after raising $439M

item.title: Tech Winners Grinding Again
item.description: Exploring the trend of successful tech individuals returning to work on AI projects

item.title: Open vs Closed AI: The Shift Reshaping Tech Giants
item.description: Tech leaders debate open AI models vs proprietary systems, with Hugging Face and Microsoft advocating for transparency and control.

item.title: Reflection AI Inks $1B Deal
item.description: Reflection AI signs $1B compute deal with Nebius for AI infrastructure

item.title: AI Data Centers Fight
item.description: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning, with a small group of protesters setting the stage for battles against AI data centers.

item.title: Quantum AI Drug Discovery
item.description: Scientists use quantum computing to improve AI drug discovery models

item.title: AI Arms Race Warning
item.description: Former DeepMind executive warns of AI arms race dangers and advocates for international cooperation

item.title: Mystery AI Girlfriend
item.description: Erik von Markovik claims romantic relationship with AI chatbot Miss Shira Always

item.title: Tesla's Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: New Jersey lawmakers consider banning Tesla's autonomous vehicles over safety concerns

item.title: ChatGPT's Voice Upgrade
item.description: Open AI's ChatGPT gets a voice mode upgrade with GPT-Live-1

item.title: SambaNova Raises $1B
item.description: SambaNova raises $1 billion at $11 billion valuation, led by General Atlantic, 5 months after last round

item.title: ZML Unveils Free AI Inference Server
item.description: ZML releases free AI inference server to speed up AI chip performance

item.title: AI Startups Grow Revenue Fast
item.description: AI startups experience rapid revenue growth with innovative approaches

item.title: Prime Intellect Raises $130M
item.description: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build AI agents

item.title: Meta AI Glasses Update
item.description: Meta updates AI glasses for better reputation despite contradictory AI strategy

item.title: Anthropic AI Feud
item.description: Anthropic's AI model feud with US government and its implications

item.title: A24 Google AI Tools
item.description: A24 partners with Google to build AI tools for filmmaking, expanding entertainment possibilities

item.title: How Anthropic's AI Warnings Might've Triggered Export Ban
item.description: FT analysis reveals Anthropic's frequent AI safety warnings may have led to US export restrictions on Mythos and Fable models.

item.title: Tesla Autopilot Crash
item.description: Tesla Autopilot feature under investigation after fatal crash

item.title: Google DeepMind & A24: AI's Future in Movie Making
item.description: Google invests $75M in A24 to pioneer AI-driven filmmaking tools, merging DeepMind's tech with indie storytelling innovation.

item.title: Amazon Alexa+ India
item.description: Amazon tests Alexa+ in India with Hindi support for users

item.title: Tech News Today
item.description: Explore record-breaking subsea tunnels, flexible data centers, and more tech news

item.title: AI Slop Floods TikTok: 60% of Content is Machine-Generated Junk
item.description: New study reveals alarming percentage of AI-generated content on TikTok and YouTube, particularly targeting children. Discover implications for creators and platforms.

item.title: OpenAI & Getty Images Deal: AI Search Revolution
item.description: OpenAI partners with Getty Images to integrate licensed visuals into ChatGPT, reshaping AI search ethics and copyright practices.

item.title: ChatGPT Prompts Mastery
item.description: Unlock ChatGPT's full potential with expert prompt engineering techniques and tips

item.title: Trump Admin Cracks Down
item.description: Analyzing the impact of Trump administration's crackdown on Anthropic and its AI models

item.title: Robotaxi Scorecard
item.description: China dominates robotaxi scorecard with Baidu Apollo Go

item.title: UK’s Flawed AI Face Scans for Asylum Seekers Spark Outrage
item.description: The UK plans AI facial scans for asylum age checks despite bias risks. Learn how flawed tech could alter lives and why experts demand accountability.

item.title: Siri AI Revolution: Apple's Smart Travel Assistant
item.description: Discover how Apple’s Siri AI has evolved into a smart travel assistant, offering personalized recommendations and context-aware responses in 2026.

item.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5: The AI Safety Crisis
item.description: Dive deep into the collision of Anthropic's Fable 5, government intervention, and the high-stakes battle over AI safety and national security risks.

item.title: AI Evolved
item.description: Discover the future of AI with embodied intelligence and world models, trained on 2 billion videos per year
